mnemonics: Passwd: Passwords Are Safe With Dates
keyPoints: Echo: Used to display text on the screen
Print: Used to display text on the screen similar to echo but with more formatting options
Ls: Used to list the files and directories in the current directory
Who: Used to display the current users and their login information
Date: Used to display the current date and time
Passwd: Used to display and modify user passwords
Cal: Used to display a calendar for the month
Combining: Used to combine multiple commands into one and execute them in a single step
